headline: What A. O. Smith (AOS)'s China Slowdown and Downgrades Mean For Shareholders
summary: In recent days, JPMorgan downgraded A. O. Smith to Underweight following lowered guidance and a weaker outlook for its China business and residential exposure, while DA Davidson also reduced its expectations after a soft quarter. These actions underscore how softer earnings trends, weaker return on invested capital, and persistent demand challenges are pressuring the company’s near-term prospects. We’ll now examine how JPMorgan’s concerns about China’s worsening demand picture reshape A. O...
